name: David Volz
title: Software Manager & Engineer
summary: Experienced software manager and engineer with a passion for building elegant, performant web applications. Skilled in modern frontend frameworks, team leadership, and delivering high-quality products.

highlights: Led a team of engineers to deliver key product features
Improved development workflows and CI/CD pipelines
Mentored junior engineers and conducted code reviews
Built and maintained customer-facing web applications
Implemented responsive designs and accessibility improvements
Collaborated with product and design teams on feature development
Developed frontend components using modern JavaScript frameworks
Wrote unit and integration tests to ensure code quality
Participated in agile sprints and retrospectives

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.name: Personal Site (dv-astro)
projects.description: A personal portfolio and playground built from scratch with Astro 6, featuring custom SVG animations, tiled backgrounds, and a YouTube timing controller.
